---
quote: "A river cuts through rock not because of its power, but because of its persistence."
author: James N. Watkins
what_it_means_to_me: "This quote teaches me that success is not determined by strength or talent alone, but by the ability to keep moving forward despite obstacles. Just as a river shapes solid rock through continuous flow, consistent effort and perseverance can overcome even the greatest challenges. It reminds me that small actions repeated every day create extraordinary results over time."
contributor: Lohendra V S
department: EIE
tags: ["hard work", "persistence", "consistency", "perseverance", "determination", "resilience", "self-growth", "success", "motivation"]
